content:
# Two-Repo Workflow: dorea Pipeline + Workspace
Pipeline code (scripts/, luts/, references/) lives in repos/dorea/ — separate git repo (chunzhe10/dorea.git, default branch: main). This directory is gitignored in the workspace repo.
Workspace-level changes (docs/, .corvia/, AGENTS.md) go in the workspace repo (chunzhe10/dorea-workspace.git, default branch: master).
## Workflow
Create feature branches and PRs in both repos when changes span both. Reference workspace issues with chunzhe10/dorea-workspace#N in the dorea PR.
## Example (issue #3)
chunzhe10/dorea#2 for pipeline code, chunzhe10/dorea-workspace#13 for design decision doc.
